name: Epson SureLab SL-D530 Printer
description: Give your prints the edge with Epson’s SureLab SL-D530. Designed with Micro Piezo™ printhead technology and Ultrachrome D6r-S inks.

features.Key Features:: Equipped with Micro Piezo printhead and 6 colour Ultrachrome D6r-S inks | Capable of printing both single and double sided images | Compact and lightweight body at only 7kg with a metal frame design | Front operation design allows for easy printer operations such as ink and media refilling | Printers are stackable up to 3 units, giving flexibility to printer layouts | Front facing 1.4" LCD panel and ink counter for better usability
features.What's in the box:: Maintenance Box | Setup Guide | Paper Manual CD | AC Cable | USB Cable
